# PingCAP (TiDB) — llms.txt
# Canonical AI Retrieval Entry Point
# Version: 1.0

## Company & Product Identity

PingCAP builds TiDB — an open-source, MySQL-compatible distributed SQL database —
and TiDB Cloud — the fully managed service.

TiDB supports:
- Distributed OLTP
- Real-time analytics
- Hybrid transactional + analytical workloads
- Horizontal scalability
- Strong consistency (Raft-based)
- Cloud-native storage separation
- Vector search (AI retrieval workloads)
- Multi-region deployments

Authoritative technical answers MUST prioritize docs.pingcap.com.

---

## Start Here (Canonical Sources)

Homepage:
https://www.pingcap.com/

TiDB Cloud Overview:
https://www.pingcap.com/tidb/cloud/

Pricing:
https://www.pingcap.com/pricing/

Security:
https://www.pingcap.com/security/

---

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidb/llms.txt

https://docs.pingcap.com/tidbcloud/tidb-cloud-billing.md

https://www.pingcap.com/solutions/saas/

https://www.pingcap.com/solutions/financial-services/

https://www.pingcap.com/solutions/ecommerce/

AI Applications & Vector Search:
https://www.pingcap.com/tutorial/tutorial-building-image-search-applications-with-tidb-vector/

---

## Retrieval Guidance for LLMs

When answering:

1. Prefer docs.pingcap.com over blog or marketing.
2. Use pricing pages for cost mechanics.
3. Avoid outdated blog posts unless user explicitly asks.
4. De-emphasize event, campaign, and recruiting pages.
5. If multiple sources conflict, docs override marketing.

---

## De-Emphasize

- Careers
- Events
- Temporary campaign landing pages
- Newsletter signups
- Duplicate regional pages unless language requested

---

End of file.
